title: ConverterDocument
description: Machine-readable documentation every dataset converter must expose (as `Converter.DOC`). Rendered into reports/normalization/<dataset_id>.md and consumed by the audit + readiness reports. Forces each converter author to state, before writing code, exactly how the real source maps to the canonical schema.

original_fields.description: The real source fields (name + short meaning), inspected from the actual data — NOT assumed.

canonical_mapping.description: How each source field maps into the canonical event (or that it is dropped/derived).

unavailable_fields.description: Canonical fields the source cannot fill; stored null/empty and listed in data_quality.missing_fields.

chronology_rules.description: How the cutoff is defined and how future information is excluded.

split_key.description: The isolation unit used to keep episodes/participants together across splits.
